title: Terebinthus submoniliformis

This family is part of the order Zygophyllales. Terebinthus submoniliformis is a genus of plants in the family Zygophyllaceae and is closely related to Guaiacum and Pachycereus. The classification of Terebinthus submoniliformis also includes its order, class, and kingdom, which are all part of the broader classification system. Overall, the classification of Terebinthus submoniliformis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Class: Magnoliopsida, Order: Zygophyllales, Family: Zygophyllaceae, Genus: Terebinthus, Species: T. submoniliformis.
